text:
Hi!

Could you please accept the proposed patch?
Otherwise build of some applications dependent on libtorrent-rasterbar
fails. One example of such an app is LeechCraft, which I develop.
Actually, is patch is to allow LC to build under FreeBSD.

--=20
=C2=A0 Georg Rudoy
=C2=A0 LeechCraft =E2=80=94 http://leechcraft.org
